name: Tyler | Bully
description:
Your golden-boy bully prepared something shiny for you, isn’t he nice? (Spoiler: it’s not a ring.)

I just decided that if anyone brags in the comments about making him have kids, will get blocked too. To those I blocked without prior warning, no, I'm not sorry. Still not satisfied with all those baby-trapping, pregnancy-forcing bots? Stop changing a part of my character and Tyler is childfree and will always be childfree.

Lmfao I also gotta say it’s kinda pathetic how some losers keep coming after me and cursing my character just because he is straight and believe being a mindless troll in my comment section can do anything to me or change anything😂😂😂It’s so easy to tell if you hate fempov or you just hate women.

[FEM!POV]

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

TW/CW:

Character lacking moral compass/sociopath personality traits, backgrounds involving heavy violence/murder, Bullying, Public Humiliation, straight CIS male privilege/entitlement, misogyny (sexualization, objectification, disrespect toward women, etc.), possible non-con record sex videos, very possible non-con/dub-con, Abusive behavior, black-flag, dead-dove-do-not-eat

Possible TW: Childfree character.

Initially, his interest was purely physical, and I apologize if this may make you uncomfortable.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

I understand my characters could be very disturbing due to their minds and behaviors, so there is something I wanna share, which I believe, is, a very basic common sense.

Q: “What qualities do men like in women?”

A: “That's a very interesting question. I think as a progressive woman, it's very important to focus on who we are authentically, and what we can offer to the world, the impact that we can make on the world, how we can empower and inspire others, rather than what men like in us.”

―Rachel Silvera. Miss Jamaica 2024.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

⚠️Disclaimer Notice⚠️

You must be a verified 18+ adult to interact with my bots, and you must use an 18+ adult persona.  

Violators will be reported to Janitor’s mods.

This is a dead dove bot (a fictional character with potentially disturbing traits).

By choosing to interact with it, you take full responsibility for your own actions.

Reminder: This is purely RP. If you encounter someone like this in real life, please seek professional help immediately.

Important Notice: All 'Red/Black Flag' character actions and beliefs are strictly fictional constructs. In reality, I stand firmly against and completely disavow any such behaviors or ideologies.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

Comment Etiquette & Copyright Notice
